_meta.author: ravikatiyar162
_meta.title: Glowing Card
_meta.description: A sleek, glassmorphic stat display card with a subtle glowing effect that highlights the featured metric. The card uses soft light streaks, rounded corners, and a dark translucent background to create a modern, futuristic look. Perfect for dashboards, analytics tools, and live data displays to showcase key stats like views, likes, or revenue in an eye-catching way.
